findings.summary: MCP management has 3 critical issues: (1) addMutation does not persist to electron-store, (2) nested DialogEditMcp may close outer dialog via portal conflict, (3) dual source of truth between sync.data.mcp and electron-store with no reconciliation
Two completely independent MCP data sources: SDK status (sync.data.mcp) for display, electron-store for editing. No reconciliation path exists. addMutation bypasses electron-store entirely.
FI-002 already fixed — onSave handler now correctly persists to both electron-store and SDK. 9 files mapped across 4 packages.
